title: Work and Opportunities for Women (WOW) programme: Strengthening gender in investment policy reforms in Tanzania
body: "The review aims to inform discussions on Tanzania Vision 2050 and sector plans, emphasising gender equality in investment reform. This is linked to job creation for women, boosting economic growth, living standards, and social outcomes. Indirectly, it can attract further investment and enhance gender equality outcomes. "

taxons.title: Women and girls in developing countries
